## Overview

`defenseclaw-gateway restart` — Restart the gateway sidecar daemon.

## Reference

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGEN:cli_go:restart -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand. Regenerate with `make docs-gen`. -->

### Synopsis

```bash
restart
```

### Description

Restart the DefenseClaw gateway sidecar daemon.

Equivalent to 'stop' followed by 'start'.

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_go:restart -->

## Usage

_Concrete invocation recipes are added by the `cli-commands` subagents.

also available one layer up._
